name: Metoro
description: eBPF-native Kubernetes observability platform providing traces, metrics and logs without manual instrumentation.

seo.title: Metoro — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Metoro: eBPF-native Kubernetes observability platform providing traces, metrics and logs without manual instrumentation.

when_to_use: Zero-config Kubernetes observability via eBPF probes
Traces, metrics, and logs without application code changes

pros: eBPF instrumentation requires zero code changes
Traces, metrics, logs from a single agent
cons: Pricing and scale story still unproven
review.verdict: Genuinely exciting eBPF-first APM that eliminates SDK toil; early but production-credible for Kubernetes shops.
review.best_for: Kubernetes teams tired of per-language SDK instrumentation for tracing.
review.not_for: Non-Kubernetes stacks or teams needing custom business metrics in code.
